message:
fix(pager): evict beyond-db_size freelist entries from memory after commit

After Phase C promotes freed pages into inner.freelist, stale entries
from rolled-back EOF allocations (page > db_size) persisted in the
in-memory freelist even though they were never serialized to disk.
This caused the in-memory state to diverge from the durable state:
a pager reopen would not have these entries, but the running pager
retained them indefinitely.

Add a retain() filter in both commit paths (WAL Phase C1 and rollback
journal Phase C) to evict freelist entries beyond the committed db_size
after promoting freed pages.

Fixes pre-existing test failure:
test_commit_filters_beyond_db_size_freelist_entries_from_durable_state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
